parameters.name: filterMinimalScope
parameters.description: Filter only users that have at least following scopes

parameters.name: filterViewLanguageId
parameters.description: Filter only users that can view language

parameters.name: filterEditLanguageId
parameters.description: Filter only users that can edit language

parameters.name: filterStateLanguageId
parameters.description: Filter only users that can edit state of language

parameters.name: size
parameters.description: The size of the page to be returned

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sorting criteria in the format: property,(asc|desc). Default sort order is ascending. Multiple sort criteria are supported.
